ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant (e.g., M, F) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the participant in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the participant in pounds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the coach (e.g., nutrition, fitness) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in weeks */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workouts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the participants table */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the programs table */,
  "workout_date" TEXT /* Date of the workout */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance covered during the workout in meters */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score representing the participant's performance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workout record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workout record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the participants table */,
  "age_group" INTEGER /* Age group of the participant (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant (e.g., M, F) */,
  "glasses" TEXT /* Indicator if the participant wears glasses (Y/N) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the participant in inches */,
  "wingspan" INTEGER /* Wingspan of the participant in inches */,
  "cw_distance" INTEGER /* Distance covered during workouts in meters */,
  "complete" TEXT /* Indicator if the participant completed their fitness goals (Y/N) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score representing the participant's performance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., admin, coach, participant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
